name: Impossible Peaches & Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Prepare streusel topping: Cut butter into bisquick and sugar until crumbly; stir in slivered almonds.
3. Drain peaches and pat dry with a paper towel. Sprinkle with cinnamon and nutmeg, then toss.
4. Spread peach slices evenly in a greased 10-inch pie plate.
5. In a blender, beat eggs, remaining sugar, Bisquick, and whipping cream until smooth for about 15 seconds.
6. Pour batter over the peaches in the pie plate.
7. Sprinkle streusel topping evenly over the filling.
8. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Serve each slice with additional whipped cream.
Note: Sliced fresh peaches can be substituted (3 1/2 cups).
